nodes.name: 葛摩
nodes.summary: 葛摩是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括Malagasy turtle dove、Comoro olive pigeon、白喉秧鸡等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Grande Comore brush warbler
nodes.summary: The Grande Comore brush warbler (Nesillas brevicaudata) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Acrocephalidae. It is found in Comoros and Mayotte. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Grande Comore brush warbler (Nesillas brevicaudata) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Acrocephalidae. It is found in Como…
